Off Calendar Jan-31-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Lydia V. Ko, Stone & Associates, 925.938.1555, appearing for the Defendant;
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

The tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF JULIO ESBREZ' Motion For Leave To Propound Discovery Re: Financial Condition is DENIED. Plaintiff did not provide sufficient evidence that that there is a substantial probability that the plaintiff will prevail on the punitive damages claim. Order signed. Arlene Barton, Judge Pro-Tem, Jacqueline Alameda, Clerk, Not Reported. =302/JPT

MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File First Amended Complt
Off Calendar Jan-16-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Juliet MacMillin-Lompa, Esq. of Stone & Associates, Tel. 925.938.1555 ext. 10, for defendant and opposing party, via court call;
No other appearance.

RULING: The matter was discussed. The court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF JULIO ESBREZ' MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File First Amended Complaint is granted. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: The court did receive courtesy copies of the opposition papers as required by Local Rule 2.6B prior to the hearing. THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. DEFENDANT SF VERDI CLUB, INC.'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT IS DENIED. DEFENDANT HAS UNTIL MARCH 22 TO FILE AN ANSWER.
